summary: Bug carded: auto-retry never engaged on RunPod "does not have the resources" refusal (scarce 5090 / Any-region); narrow out-of-stock regex missed the wording in 2 places.

Fix shipped: shared _isStockRefusal() in shell.js + MpiSettings.js, broadened to RunPod wordings; regex self-check + 16/16 hardening tests + eslint pass. Maturity validating — live RunPod verify owed.
Corrected: card had real in-flight work + live-verify owed, belongs in doing/in-progress not done. (Was wrongly jumped todo->done.)
3 fixes on disk: (1) _isStockRefusal regex, (2) wait-loop 15s backoff (de-spin), (3) panel status creating->connecting (4 spots). Logic-verified; live verify owed after app restart.

Consolidated: MPI-138 (dup-wait guard) merged in as Defect 4. Fixes 1-2 live-verified (retry engages, ~15s spacing). Defect 5 (button flicker every 15s) OPEN -- root-caused to Settings retry calling LOUD _initRemoteBoot per tick; needs deliberate redesign (silent per-retry create). Single owner for the whole auto-retry-connect issue.
